<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" dir="ltr" class="html-category-page">
<head>
<title>Lycoming O-235 Aircraft Engines | New, Rebuilt &amp; Overhauled | Air Power, Inc.</title>
<meta http-equiv="Content-type" content="text/html;charset=UTF-8" />
<meta name="description" content="Air Power, Inc. is the #1 global distributor of Lycoming aircraft engines. Explore the full range of Lycoming O-235 engines&#x2014;factory new, rebuilt, and overhauled&#x2014;ready to ship with full factory support." />
<meta name="keywords" content="Lycoming O-235 engine, O-235 aircraft engine, factory new Lycoming, rebuilt Lycoming O-235, Lycoming overhauled engine, O-235 overhaul, Lycoming distributor, aircraft engine for sale" />
<meta name="generator" content="nopCommerce" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, minimum-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=2.0" />
<link rel="preload" as="font" href="/Themes/Venture/Content/fonts/venture-font.woff" crossorigin />
<style type="text/css">@font-face {font-family:Fjalla One;font-style:normal;font-weight:400;src:url(/cf-fonts/s/fjalla-one/5.0.11/latin-ext/400/normal.woff2);unicode-range:U+0100-02AF,U+0304,U+0308,U+0329,U+1E00-1E9F,U+1EF2-1EFF,U+2020,U+20A0-20AB,U+20AD-20CF,U+2113,U+2C60-2C7F,U+A720-A7FF;font-display:swap;}@font-face {font-family:Fjalla One;font-style:normal;font-weight:400;src:url(/cf-fonts/s/fjalla-one/5.0.11/cyrillic-ext/400/normal.woff2);unicode-range:U+0460-052F,U+1C80-1C88,U+20B4,U+2DE0-2DFF,U+A640-A69F,U+FE2E-FE2F;font-display:swap;}@font-face {font-family:Fjalla One;font-style:normal;font-weight:400;src:url(/cf-fonts/s/fjalla-one/5.0.11/latin/400/normal.woff2);unicode-range:U+0000-00FF,U+0131,U+0152-0153,U+02BB-02BC,U+02C6,U+02DA,U+02DC,U+0304,U+0308,U+0329,U+2000-206F,U+2074,U+20AC,U+2122,U+2191,U+2193,U+2212,U+2215,U+FEFF,U+FFFD;font-display:swap;}@font-face {font-family:Fjalla One;font-style:normal;font-weight:400;src:url(/cf-fonts/s/fjalla-one/5.0.11/vietnamese/400/normal.woff2);unicode-range:U+0102-0103,U+0110-0111,U+0128-0129,U+0168-0169,U+01A0-01A1,U+01AF-01B0,U+0300-0301,U+0303-0304,U+0308-0309,U+0323,U+0329,U+1EA0-1EF9,U+20AB;font-display:swap;}</style>

<script type="application/ld+json">
{
"@context": "https://schema.org/",
"@type": "LocalBusiness",
"@id": "https://www.airpowerinc.com/",
"additionalType": [
"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Aircraft_engine",
"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Aircraft_part"
],
"name": "Air Power Inc.",
"alternateName": [
"factory engines",
"aircraft engine parts",
"continental engines",
"cessna parts"
],
"description": "Air Power Inc is your trusted direct wholesale distributor for factory aircraft engines, parts, cylinders, and components with a focus on Cessna aircraft parts.",
"currenciesAccepted": "USD",
"paymentAccepted": "Credit Card",
"priceRange": "Varies",
"url": "https://www.airpowerinc.com/#LocalBusiness",
"logo": "https://www.airpowerinc.com/images/thumbs/0009864_AirPowerIncLogo.jpeg",
"image": "https://www.airpowerinc.com/images/thumbs/0004062_continental-engine-rebuilt-io-550-n43_260.png",
"telephone": "+18662878886",
"contactPoint": {
"@type" : "ContactPoint",
"name" : "Contact us",
"url": "https://www.airpowerinc.com/contactus",
"contactType" : "customer service"
},
"openingHours": "Mo, Tu, We, Th, Fr 07:00-19:00",
"address": {
"@type": "PostalAddress",
"streetAddress": "4900 S Collins St",
"addressLocality": "Arlington",
"addressRegion": "TX",
"postalCode": "76018"
},
"geo": {
"type": "GeoCoordinates",
"latitude": "32.6664505",
"longitude": "-97.0925124"
},
"hasMap": "https://www.google.com/maps/place/Air+Power+Inc/@32.6664505,-97.0925124,15z/data=!4m5!3m4!1s0x0:0x8e50abe077af0882!8m2!3d32.6665523!4d-97.0923473",
"sameAs": [
"https://www.facebook.com/AirPowerInc/",
"https://www.linkedin.com/company/air-power-inc.",
"https://twitter.com/airpowerengines?lang=en"
],
"aggregateRating": {
"@type": "AggregateRating",
"ratingValue": "4.0",
"reviewCount": "14"
},
"review": [
{
"@type": "Review",
"author": {
"@type": "Person",
"name": "Jackson Rogers"
},
"datePublished": "2021-06-26",
"reviewBody": "Great place to get Cessna parts. Fast shipping and excellent prices.",
"name": "Fast shipping and excellent prices!",
"reviewRating": {
"@type": "Rating",
"bestRating": "5",
"ratingValue": "5",
"worstRating": "1"
}
},
{
"@type": "Review",
"author": {
"@type": "Person",
"name": "Ted Hogue"
},
"datePublished": "2019-09-27",
"reviewBody": "VERY HELPFUL service recently, and over the past several times I have needed parts for my C-182. Steve Vacek was very helpful in answering my questions, etc.",
"name": "Steve Vacek was very helpful!",
"reviewRating": {
"@type": "Rating",
"bestRating": "5",
"ratingValue": "5",
"worstRating": "1"
}
}
],
"areaServed": [
{
"@type": "Place",
"additionalType": "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dallas%E2%80%93Fort_Worth_metroplex",
"name": "Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex"
},
{
"@type": "State",
"additionalType": "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Texas",
"name": "Texas"
},
{
"@type": "Country",
"additionalType": "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/United_States",
"name": "United States"
},
{
"@type": "Place",
"name": "Worldwide - Global"
}
],
"hasOfferCatalog": {
"@type": "OfferCatalog",
"name": "Aviation Factory Engines & Parts",
"url": "https://www.airpowerinc.com/manufacturer/all#OfferCatalog",
"itemListElement": [
{
"@type": "Offer",
"itemOffered": {
"@type": "Offer",
"name": "Continental Aircraft Parts, Cessna Aircraft Engines, Continental Engines",
"description": "With our Continental engine parts search bar, search for specification and price for all continental aircraft engines. Learn more and call us today for your Cessna aircraft engine parts.",
"image": "https://www.airpowerinc.com/images/thumbs/0004054_Continental_550_Avgas_Aircraft_Piston_Engine.png_260.png",
"url": "https://www.airpowerinc.com/continental-engines#Offer"
}
},
{
"@type": "Offer",
"itemOffered": {
"@type": "Offer",
"name": "Lycoming Engines, Aircraft Engine Parts, Cessna Replacement Engines",
"description": "With our Lycoming engine parts search bar, search for specification and price for all lycoming aircraft engine parts. Learn more and call us today for your Cessna aircraft engine parts.",
"image": "https://www.airpowerinc.com/images/thumbs/0004982_series-engine-360.png_260.png",
"url": "https://www.airpowerinc.com/lycoming-engines#Offer"
}
},
{
"@type": "Offer",
"itemOffered": {
"@type": "Offer",
"name": "Aircraft Engine Cylinders, Lycoming, ECI, Superior, Continental Cylinders",
"description": "Need replacement parts for your aircraft? Air Power provides a large array of quality ECI and Lycoming cylinders to meet your aircraft needs. Call 866-287-8886 today!",
"image": "https://www.airpowerinc.com/images/thumbs/0003727_Lycoming%20Cylinder.png_260.png",
"url": "https://www.airpowerinc.com/cylinders#Offer"
}
},
{
"@type": "Offer",
"itemOffered": {
"@type": "Offer",
"name": "Lycoming Parts For Sale | Continental Engine Parts & Cessna Parts",
"description": "Air Power Inc is your trusted direct wholesale distributor for Lycoming parts, Continental engine parts, Superior Air Parts, and other Cessna aircraft parts.",
"image": "https://airpowerinc.com/images/thumbs/0002605_isolator-ppu-gap_260.png",
"url": "https://www.airpowerinc.com/parts#Offer"
}
},
{
"@type": "Offer",
"itemOffered": {
"@type": "Offer",
"name": "Aircraft Avionics Shop | Top Avionics Brands: Garmin, Airborne, Comant",
"description": "Air Power Inc. has the largest selection of top aircraft avionics brands. We have premium products from Garmin, Airborne, Comant, Textron Aviation, and more.",
"url": "https://www.airpowerinc.com/avionics#Offer"
}
},
{
"@type": "Offer",
"itemOffered": {
"@type": "Offer",
"name": "Cessna Parts | Cessna Hardware: Bolts, Nuts, Hose Assembly, Plugs",
"description": "We have the largest selection of Cessna hardware: from nuts & bolts to screws & tees from reliable name brands like Continental, Lycoming & more. Shop today.",
"url": "https://www.airpowerinc.com/hardware#Offer"
}
}
]
}
}
</script>

<style>

/* Font CSS rules added 9.23 when switching globally to Avenir */
/* A lot of buttons & such broke, which require a bit of finessing */
@font-face {
font-family: 'Avenir';
font-weight: 300;
font-style: normal;
src: local('Avenir Book'), local('Avenir-300'), url('../fonts/Avenir-Book/Avenir-Book.eot') format('embedded-opentype'), url('../fonts/Avenir-Book/Avenir-Book.woff2') format('woff2'), url('../fonts/Avenir-Book/Avenir-Book.ttf') format('truetype');
}

@font-face {
font-family: 'Avenir';
font-weight: 500;
font-style: normal;
src: local('Avenir Medium'), local('Avenir-500'), url('../fonts/Avenir-Medium/Avenir-Medium.eot') format('embedded-opentype'), url('../fonts/Avenir-Medium/Avenir-Medium.woff2') format('woff2'), url('../fonts/Avenir-Medium/Avenir-Medium.ttf') format('truetype');
}

@font-face {
font-family: 'Avenir';
font-weight: 700;
font-style: normal;
src: local('Avenir Heavy'), local('Avenir-700'), url('../fonts/Avenir-Heavy/Avenir-Heavy.eot') format('embedded-opentype'), url('../fonts/Avenir-Heavy/Avenir-Heavy.woff2') format('woff2'), url('../fonts/Avenir-Heavy/Avenir-Heavy.ttf') format('truetype');
}

@font-face {
font-family: 'Avenir';
font-weight: 900;
font-style: normal;
src: local('Avenir Black'), local('Avenir-900'), url('../fonts/Avenir-Black/Avenir-Black.eot') format('embedded-opentype'), url('../fonts/Avenir-Black/Avenir-Black.woff2') format('woff2'), url('../fonts/Avenir-Black/Avenir-Black.ttf') format('truetype');
}

li.last-page {
display: none;
}

body {
font-family: Avenir, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
}

h1 {
font-weight: 900; /* Avenir Black */
}

h2 {
font-weight: 700; /* Avenir Heavy */
}

h3 {
font-weight: 500; /* Avenir Medium */
}

h4, h5, h6 {
font-weight: 300; /* Avenir Book */
}

.fw-700 {
font-weight: 700;
}

.fw-900 {
font-weight: 900;
}

.text-upper {
text-transform: uppercase;
}

.stock-quantity {
color: gray;
}

.block .list .active > a {
font-weight: 700;
}

.qq-upload-button-selector.qq-upload-button {
font-family: 'Fjalla One';
}

.page-title {
text-transform: uppercase;
}

.title strong {
font-size: 1.35rem;
text-transform: capitalize;
}

/* @media (max-width: 1269px) {
#TopBannerDesktop {
display:none;
}
}

@media (min-width: 1270px) {
#TopBannerMobile {
display: none;
}
} */

.product-title {
font-weight: 700;
}

@media (min-width: 481px) {
.customer-pages-body .block .list .customer-customquotes a:before {
content: "B";
}
}

*, *::before, *::after {
box-sizing: border-box;
}

.block-account-navigation .listbox .list li a {
min-width: 216px;
}

/* Makes sure Administartion / Manage this page / Speak to an expert are visible on mobile */
.admin-header-links * {
margin: 0px 5px;
min-height: 35px;
}

@media only screen and (max-width: 600px) {
a.manage-page, a.administration {
font-size: 10px;
}

.admin-header-links {
/* 6/29/22 - Mobile font size*/
font-size: 0.9rem;
}
}

/* 6/12/23 - Increase font size and weight of Signature Delivery and Hold Ship Entire Order inputs to make them more visible */
.section.checkout-attributes .attribute-values label {
font-weight: 600 !important;
font-size: 1.05em !important;
}

.product-details-page .call-for-price {
color: white;
}


.customer-pages-body .block .list .saved-cards a:before {
content: "\61";
}

#OnePageCheckoutSubmitButton {
color: white !important;
}

.inputs label {
text-transform: none !important;
}

.options.ship-to-same-address {
padding: 0px !important;
}

@media (min-width: 1201px) {
.ship-to-same-address {
margin: 0 !important;
}

.checkout-page .total-info {
padding: 20px;
}

.order-summary-content {
margin-bottom: 0 !important;
}
}

.free-shipping-banner {
text-align: center;
background-color: #ffdf42;
color: black;
padding-bottom: 5px;
padding-top: 5px;
font-weight: 700;
}


/* The message wraps poorly when between 386 & 460 px */
@media (min-width: 386px) and (max-width: 460px) {
.free-shipping-banner {
font-size: .8rem;
}
}

.header-lower-banner {
text-align: center;
background-color: #122d67;
color: #ffffff;
padding-bottom: 5px;
}

.payment-info .info {
font-family: unset !important;
color: unset !important;
}

.payment-info .info input {
margin: 0 !important;
}

.coupon-box-panel button, .giftcard-box-panel button {
font-size: 13px !important;
line-height: 31px !important;
padding: 0px !important;
}

input[type='checkbox'] ~ label:before {
border: 1px solid #888C8C !important;
box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(15,17,17,.15) inset !important;
}

input:not(.search-box-text):not(.newsletter-subscribe-text):not(.qty-input):not(#CsvFile), select {
height: 31px !important;
padding: 3px 7px !important;
line-height: normal !important;
background-color: #fff !important;
border: 1px solid #a8b3b3 !important;
border-radius: 4px !important;
box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(15,17,17,.12) inset !important;
outline: 0 !important;
}

input:focus:not(.search-box-text):not(.newsletter-subscribe-text):not(#CsvFile), select:focus {
background-color: #eff9ff !important;
border-color: #1488cc !important;
box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #C8F3FA, 0 1px 2px rgba(15,17,17,.15) inset !important;
}

.add-to-cart > .add-to-cart-qty-wrapper > input.qty-input:not(.search-box-text):not(.newsletter-subscribe-text):not(#CsvFile) {
height: 50px !important;
}

.add-to-cart-qty-wrapper > input {
background-color: #fff !important;
border: 1px solid #a8b3b3 !important;
border-radius: 4px !important;
box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(15,17,17,.12) inset !important;
}

input:not(.search-box-text)::placeholder {
color: #c1c1c1 !important;
}

.apply-discount-coupon-code-button {
padding: 6px 10px !important;
}

.coupon-code button:hover {
color: white;
background-color: #4886ca !important;
}

#AzureSearchButton {
color: white;
padding-top: 6px;
padding-bottom: 6px;
}

.swal2-confirm {
background-color: #3472b5 !important;
}


/* 8/30/2023 dumped the entirety of database-based 'Custom Head Styles' on /Admin/VentureThemeAdmin/Settings here. */

.confirm-order-loader .spinner {
top: 45vh;
}

.product-details-page .call-for-price {
color: white;
}

.logo > img {
content: url("https://airpowerstorage.blob.core.windows.net/uploads/9808fa33-7345-496d-983d-038360c67c67.png");
}

@media (max-width: 1200px) {
.light-theme .responsive-nav-wrapper {
background-color: #1488cc;
}

.responsive-nav-wrapper .cart-qty, .selector-title:before, .store-search-box form:before {
color: white;
}

.plus-button:before {
color: #1488cc;
}
}

/* NEW SEARCH BAR STYLES */
#small-searchterms {
width: 98%;
margin-left: 5px;
margin-right: 5px;
margin-top: 20px;
font-size: 18px;
}

@media (max-width: 1200px) {
#small-searchterms {
width: 100%;
margin-bottom: 20px;
}

#SearchBarMultiLineLink {
display: none;
}
}

@media (min-width: 1201px) {
.multilineSearchTopNav {
display: none !important;
}

.store-search-box {
position: initial;
padding: 0px;
background-color: transparent;
}

.store-search-box form.open {
width: 100%;
}

.header-menu .sublist-wrap {
padding: 6px 0 0;
}

#SearchBarSearchIcon:hover {
text-decoration: none !important;
}

.search-box {
width: 50%;
}

.search-opener {
display: none;
}

.ui-autocomplete {
position: initial;
width: 98% !important;
margin-left: 5px;
margin-right: 5px;
}
}

@media (min-width: 1400px) {
#SearchBarMultiLineLink {
right: 27px !important;
}
}
/* NEW SEARCH BAR STYLES */


@media (min-width: 1201px) {
.light-theme .header-lower:nth-child(2) {
background-color: #1488cc;
z-index: 3;
/* border-bottom: 0.5rem solid #29aae1; */
}

.light-theme .header-lower {
background-color: #122d67;
padding: 0px;
/* border-bottom: 0.5rem solid #29aae1; */
}

.light-theme .header-center {
height: 100%;
min-height: 50px;
}

.light-theme .header-lower {
min-height: 50px;
}

.light-theme .header-menu > ul > li > a, .light-theme .header-menu > ul > li > span {
color: #fff;
}

.header-menu > ul > li:hover > a {
text-decoration: underline;
}

.light-layout.header-menu .sublist {
background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.95);
box-shadow: 0px 10px 20px 0px rgb(18 45 103 / 50%), 0px 10px 10px 0px rgb(0 0 0 / 30%);
}

.specificationFilterPanel7Spikes .filtersGroupPanel {
padding: 10px 5px;
}

.customer-pages-body .block .list a {
-webkit-transform: inherit !important;
}
}

@media (min-width: 481px) {
.customer-pages-body .side-2 .block .list .active a, .customer-pages-body .side-2 .block .list a:hover {
background: #1488cc;
}

.customer-pages-body .side-2 .block .list .active a:after, .customer-pages-body .side-2 .block .list a:hover:after {
background: #29AAE1;
}
}

.footer-block.find-us .address span:before, .footer-block.find-us span:before {
color: #fff !important;
}

.footer a:hover {
color: #fff;
text-decoration: underline;
}

.social-sharing a:hover {
color: #29AAE1 !important;
}

.text-italic {
font-style: italic !important;
}

.product-details-page .variant-specifications .product-specs-box {
display: inherit !important;
}

.overview .stock .value.ap-stock,
.variant-overview .stock .value.ap-stock {
background: #269514;
color: #fff;
}

.instant-search-item .detail .price {
display: none !important;
}

/* --- Product Page Styling --- */
.overview .add-to-cart-button {
background-color: #269514 !important;
}

.overview .add-to-cart-button:hover {
background-color: #207710 !important;
}

.call-for-price {
background-color: #269514;
color: white;
padding: 0.25rem 1rem;
}

/* --- Air Power Website Styling --- */
.ap-headline {
line-height: 2rem;
font-size: 2rem;
}

.ap-button-primary {
background-color: #1488cc;
border: 3px solid #1488cc;
color: white;
padding: .5rem 2rem;
margin: 5px;
}

.ap-button-primary:hover, .ap-button-secondary:hover {
border: 3px solid #29AAE1;
}

.ap-button-secondary {
background-color: white;
border: 3px solid white;
color: #1488cc;
padding: .5rem 2rem;
margin: 5px;
}

.ap-link {
color: #0165B0;
}

.ap-link:hover {
color: #29aae1;
text-decoration: underline;
}
/* put the class stock-engine-table on the tbody */
tbody.stock-engine-table tr {
border-bottom: 1px solid #909090;
}

tbody.stock-engine-table td {
width: 25%;
text-align: center;
padding: 10px;
font-weight: bold;
}
/* put the class stock-engine-table-header on the first tr only */
tr.stock-engine-table-header {
border-bottom: 2px solid #909090;
font-size: 15pt;
color: #002F67;
}

/* Category Page Block Styling */
.ob-block h2, .ob-block h3 {
color: #2c2c2c;
font-weight: bold;
/* font-family: 'Fjalla One', sans-serif; */
}

.ob-block h2 {
font-size: 1.6em;
}

.ob-block h3 {
font-size: 1.3em;
}

.ob-block .page-title {
margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.ob-block {
margin-bottom: 4rem;
}

.ob-block.ob-block-01 {
background-color: #fff;
padding: 2rem;
text-align: center;
box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgb(0 0 0 / 6%);
}

@media (max-width: 991px) {
.ob-block.ob-block-02 .obb-02-img {
order: 1;
}

.ob-block.ob-block-02 .obb-02-txt {
order: 2;
}
}

.ob-block.ob-block-03 {
background-color: #fff;
padding: 2rem;
box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgb(0 0 0 / 6%);
border-left: 3px solid #1488cc;
}

.ob-block.ob-block-06 {
background-color: #002f67;
padding: 2rem;
box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgb(0 0 0 / 6%);
color: white;
text-align: center;
}

.ob-block.ob-block-06 h2 {
color: white !important;
font-weight: 400;
}

@media (min-width: 768px) and (max-width: 991px) {
.ob-block.ob-block-07 .col-lg-4 {
max-width: 50%;
margin: 0 25% 2em 25%;
}
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
.ob-block.ob-block-07 .col-lg-4 {
margin: 0 0 2em 0;
}
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
#HomeCTAButton {
display: block;
margin-right: auto;
margin-left: auto;
}
}

.ob-block.ob-block-07 h2 {
padding: 2rem 2rem 1rem 2rem;
text-transform: none;
}

.ob-block.ob-block-07 p {
color: #909090;
line-height: 25px;
padding: 0 2rem 1rem 2rem;
font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif;
text-transform: none;
}

.ob-block.ob-block-07 span.day {
font-size: 50px;
font-family: 'Fjalla One', sans-serif;
margin: 0 10px -16px .5em;
color: #fff !important;
vertical-align: text-bottom;
}

.ob-block.ob-block-07 span.monthAndYear {
color: #1488cc;
line-height: 20px;
font-size: 20px;
font-family: 'Fjalla One', sans-serif;
}

.ap-button {
background-color: #1488cc;
padding: 1rem 2rem;
letter-spacing: 2px;
text-transform: uppercase;
color: #fff !important;
font-family: 'Fjalla One', sans-serif;
max-width: 250px;
}

.ap-button:hover {
background-color: #106fa7;
}
/* end Category Block Styling */

/* background colors */
.ap-blue-1-bg {
background-color: #29AAE1 !important;
}

.ap-blue-2-bg {
background-color: #1488CC !important;
}

.ap-blue-3-bg {
background-color: #005DAC !important;
}

.ap-blue-4-bg {
background-color: #002F67 !important;
}

.ap-white-1-bg {
background-color: #E5E5E5 !important;
}

.ap-white-2-bg {
background-color: #FFF !important;
}

.ap-grey-1-bg {
background-color: #989898 !important;
}

.ap-black-1-bg {
background-color: #000 !important;
}

/* text colors */
.ap-blue-1-text {
color: #29AAE1 !important;
}

.ap-blue-2-text {
color: #1488CC !important;
}

.ap-blue-3-text {
color: #005DAC !important;
}

.ap-blue-4-text {
color: #002F67 !important;
}

.ap-white-1-text {
color: #E5E5E5 !important;
}

.ap-white-2-text {
color: #FFF !important;
}

.ap-grey-1-text {
color: #989898 !important;
}

.ap-black-1-text {
color: #000 !important;
}
/* --- End Air Power Website Color Pallete --- */
.anywhere-slider p {
text-transform: none !important;
}

.font-weight-bold {
font-weight: 700 !important;
}

/* --- OB Blog Block styling --- */
.news-item-page .news-body,
.blogpost-page .post-body {
color: #2C2C2C;
}

.ob-block.ob-blog-overview {
margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.ob-block.ob-blog-overview p {
color: #7B7B7B;
text-align: center;
font-style: italic;
}

.ob-block.ob-blog-block-00 {
background-color: #fafafa;
padding: 1.5rem;
}

.ob-blog-sep-01 {
border-top: 1 solid #d4d4d4;
margin: 0.5rem 0rem;
}

.ob-block.ob-blog-block-02 p {
font-style: italic;
}

.ob-block.ob-blog-block-05 th {
background-color: #002f67;
padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
color: white;
text-transform: uppercase;
}

.ob-block.ob-blog-block-05 td {
padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
}

.ob-block.ob-blog-block-05 tr:nth-child(odd) {
background-color: #EBEBEB;
}

.ob-block.ob-block.ob-blog-block-07 {
border: 1px solid #D4D4D4;
margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.ob-block.ob-block.ob-blog-block-07 p {
background-color: #fafafa;
padding: 1rem 1.5rem;
margin: 0px;
}

.ob-block.ob-block.ob-blog-block-07 .icon-header {
background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1488CC 0%, #0F72AC 100%);
padding: .5rem 1.5rem;
}

.ob-block.ob-block.ob-blog-block-07 .icon-header h3 {
color: white;
text-transform: uppercase;
}

.ob-block.ob-blog-block-09 {
background-color: #005dac;
padding: 3rem;
box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgb(0 0 0 / 6%);
color: white;
text-align: center;
}

.ob-block.ob-blog-block-09 h2 {
color: white !important;
font-weight: 400;
}

.ob-block.ob-blog-block-09 a:not(.ap-button-alt) {
color: white;
text-decoration: underline;
}

.ap-button-alt {
background-color: #fff;
padding: 1rem 2rem;
letter-spacing: 2px;
text-transform: uppercase;
color: #1488cc;
font-family: 'Fjalla One', sans-serif;
max-width: 250px;
}

.ap-button-alt:hover {
background-color: #e6e6e6;
}

/* Make sure item box product details fit under image */
.item-box .details {
padding-bottom: 5px !important;
}

.item-box .sku {
font-size: 14px;
}

/* Placeholder Glow css to show shop pages are loading in new products */
.placeholder {
display: inline-block;
min-height: 1em;
vertical-align: middle;
cursor: wait;
background-color: currentcolor;
opacity: 0.5;
}

.placeholder.btn::before, .falcon-data-table .paging_full_numbers .placeholder.page-link::before,
.falcon-data-table .paging_first_last_numbers .placeholder.page-link::before,
.falcon-data-table .paging_full .placeholder.page-link::before,
.falcon-data-table .paging_numbers .placeholder.page-link::before,
.falcon-data-table .paging_simple_numbers .placeholder.page-link::before, [data-list] .placeholder.page::before, .tox .tox-menu__footer .placeholder.tox-button:last-child::before,
.tox .tox-dialog__footer .placeholder.tox-button:last-child::before, .tox .tox-menu__footer .placeholder.tox-button--secondary::before,
.tox .tox-dialog__footer .placeholder.tox-button--secondary::before {
display: inline-block;
content: "";
}

.placeholder-xs {
min-height: 0.6em;
}

.placeholder-sm {
min-height: 0.8em;
}

.placeholder-lg {
min-height: 1.2em;
}

.placeholder-glow .placeholder {
-webkit-animation: placeholder-glow 2s ease-in-out infinite;
animation: placeholder-glow 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@-webkit-keyframes placeholder-glow {
50% {
opacity: 0.2;
}
}

@keyframes placeholder-glow {
50% {
opacity: 0.2;
}
}

.placeholder-wave {
-webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(130deg, #000 55%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8) 75%, #000 95%);
mask-image: linear-gradient(130deg, #000 55%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8) 75%, #000 95%);
-webkit-mask-size: 200% 100%;
mask-size: 200% 100%;
-webkit-animation: placeholder-wave 2s linear infinite;
animation: placeholder-wave 2s linear infinite;
}

@-webkit-keyframes placeholder-wave {
100% {
-webkit-mask-position: -200% 0%;
mask-position: -200% 0%;
}
}

@keyframes placeholder-wave {
100% {
-webkit-mask-position: -200% 0%;
mask-position: -200% 0%;
}
}

.social-sharing .linkedin:before {
content: '2';
}
</style>
</head>

</div>


<div class="ajax-loading-block-window" style="display: none">

</div>
<div id="dialog-notifications-error" title="Error" style="display:none;">
</div>
<div id="dialog-notifications-warning" title="Warning" style="display:none;">
</div>

<div class="master-wrapper-page">
<div class="admin-header-links">
<!-- 5-Point Customization - Wanted phone display at top, Added to Admin Header Links - This will always be shown now - Also set min-height to make sure its displayed for anonymous users -->
<a href="/login" class="ico-login d-none d-md-inline">Log in</a>
<a href="/register" class="ico-register d-none d-md-inline">Register</a>
<a href="tel:8002477693">Speak to an expert (800) 247-7693</a>

</div>
<!-- 5-POINT CUSTOMIZATION - Redesigned header, copied & replaced html file -->
<!-- 5-POINT CUSTOMIZATION - Redesigned header, copied & replaced html file -->


<div class="header">
<div class="header-upper">
<div class="header-selectors-wrapper">
</div>
</div>
<div class="header-lower">
<div class="header-left">
<div class="header-logo">



<a href="/" class="logo">


<img alt="Aircraft Parts, Engines, &amp; Accessories - Air Power Inc" src="https://airpowerstorage.blob.core.windows.net/uploads/9808fa33-7345-496d-983d-038360c67c67.png" /></a>
</div>
</div>
<div class="header-center">
<div class="search-box store-search-box ml-auto mr-auto" style="">
<!-- 5-POINT CUSTOMIZATION - REROUTED THIS ACTION TO CUSTOM AZURE SEARCH - JUST COPIED & REPLACED THE ENTIRE THING -->
<form method="get" id="small-search-box-form" class="open" action="/SearchProducts">
<!-- 5-POINT CUSTOMIZATION - Created custom input to also appear expanded on desktop screens -->
<button class="" style="color: #c1c1c1;font-size: 26px;position: absolute;left: 12px;top: 24px; background: none; border: none;" id="SearchBarSearchIcon" title="Search"><i class="fas fa-search"></i></button>
<input type="search" class="search-box-text" id="small-searchterms" autocomplete="off" name="q" placeholder="Search Parts" aria-label="Search Parts" style="height: 40px !important;padding-left: 40px !important; padding-right: 135px !important;" />
<a href="/multipartsearch" style="color: #1488cc;margin-left: 5px;position: absolute;right: 20px;top: 31px;" id="SearchBarMultiLineLink" class="">Multi-Line Search</a>
<button type="submit" class="button-1 search-box-button">Search</button>
<!-- 5-POINT CUSTOMIZATION - Added custom javascriopt to make sure search appears correctly on different screen sizes -->
</form>



<div class="search-opener">Search</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="header-right ">
<div class="header-links">
<div class="header-links-box">
<div class="header-links-box-top not-authenticated ">
<div class="header-link-wrapper login"><a href="/login?returnUrl=%2F235-series" title="Log in" class="ico-login" style="font-family: 'Fjalla One'; text-transform:uppercase;">Log in</a></div>
<div class="header-link-wrapper register"><a href="/register?returnUrl=%2F235-series" title="Register" class="ico-register" style="font-family: 'Fjalla One'; text-transform:uppercase;">Register</a></div>
</div>
<div class="header-links-box-bottom">
<div class="header-link-wrapper ">
<a href="/wishlist" title="Saved Parts" class="ico-wishlist" style="font-family: 'Fjalla One'; text-transform:uppercase;">
<span class="wishlist-label">Saved Parts</span>
<span class="wishlist-qty">(0)</span>
</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>



<div class="cart-wrapper" id="flyout-cart" data-removeItemFromCartUrl="/VentureTheme/RemoveItemFromCart" data-flyoutCartUrl="/VentureTheme/FlyoutShoppingCart">
<div id="topcartlink">
<a href="/cart" class="ico-cart text-upper fw-700">
Shopping cart<span id="CartQuantityBox" class="cart-qty" style="vertical-align: bottom;"><span class="cart-qty-number">0</span></span>
<span class="cart-total">$0.00</span>
</a>
</div>
<div class="flyout-cart">
<div class="mini-shopping-cart">
<div class="count">
You have no items in your shopping cart. </div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- 5-POINT CUSTOMIZATION - yellow banner -->
<p class="free-shipping-banner">
FREE FEDEX GROUND SHIPPING, NO ORDER MINIMUM!!! <small>*EXCLUSIONS MAY APPLY*</small>
</p>

<!-- 5-POINT CUSTOMIZATION - notification banner -->

<div class="header-center">
<div class="header-menu light-layout">
<div class="close-menu">

<ul class="sublist">

<span>Back</span>

<span>Back</span>
</li>


<li class=" ">

<a href="/cessna-172-kits" class="" title="cessna 172 kits" ><span> Cessna 172 Parts</span></a>

</div>

</h1>
</div>

<div class="page-body">
<div class="category-description">
<h2 style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: #000000;"><strong><a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/o-235-c1">O-235-C1</a>,&nbsp; <a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/o-235-c1b">-C1B</a>,&nbsp; <a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/o-235-c2a">-C2A</a>,&nbsp; <a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/o-235-c2c">-C2C</a>,&nbsp; <a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/o-235-f2b">-F2B</a>,&nbsp; <a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/o-235-h2c">-H2C</a>,&nbsp; <a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/o-235-j2a">-J2A</a>,&nbsp; <a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/o-235-k2b">-K2B</a>,&nbsp; <a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/o-235-k2c">-K2C</a>,&nbsp; <a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/o-235-l2a">-L2A</a>,&nbsp; <a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/o-235-l2c">-L2C</a>,&nbsp; <a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/o-235-n2c">-N2C</a></strong></span></h2>
<p>Find the perfect Lycoming O-235 engine for your aircraft at Air Power Inc. The four-cylinder Lycoming O-235 series is a popular choice for home-built and OEM-produced piston-powered aircraft. With models capable of producing up to 125 horsepower at 2,800 RPM, a Lycoming O-235 for sale from Air Power Inc. is just the engine you need to fly with confidence. As the largest distributor of <a class="ap-link" href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/lycoming-engines">Lycoming engines</a> worldwide, we offer all 12 models within the Lycoming O-235 engine series at the best prices in the industry, straight from the factory. Shop the entire selection of Lycoming O-235 engines for sale in our inventory, and take to the skies in an engine you can trust today.&nbsp;</p>
<p><a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/financing"><span style="text-decoration: underline;"><em>Financing is available </em></span><em>from the Van Bortel Finance Corporation for all new and rebuilt Lycoming engines for sale at Air Power Inc.</em></a></p>

</div>





<div class="product-selectors">

<div class="filters-button-wrapper">
<button class="filters-button">Filter</button>
</div>

<div class="product-viewmode">
<a title="Grid" data-viewmode="grid" class="viewmode-icon grid items-3 selected">3 Items in Grid</a>
<a title="List" data-viewmode="list" class="viewmode-icon list ">List</a>
</div>
<div class="product-sorting">
<select aria-label="Select product sort order" id="products-orderby" name="products-orderby"><option selected="selected" value="0">Position</option>
<option value="5">Name: A to Z</option>
<option value="6">Name: Z to A</option>
<option value="10">Price: Low to High</option>
<option value="11">Price: High to Low</option>
</select>
</div>
</div>


<div class="products-container">
<div class="ajax-products-busy"></div>
<div class="products-wrapper">


</div>
</div>



<div class="category-description">
<div style="max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto;">
<p>As the <strong>#1 global distributor for Lycoming Engines</strong>, Air Power, Inc. proudly supplies the complete lineup of <strong>Lycoming O-235 series engines</strong>—available in <strong>factory new, factory rebuilt, and Lycoming overhauled</strong> configurations. With proven reliability, low operating costs, and exceptional parts support, the O-235 is a cornerstone engine for training aircraft, light sport models, and experimental platforms worldwide.</p>
<p>The Lycoming O-235 is a four-cylinder, air-cooled, carbureted engine offering between <strong>100 and 125 horsepower</strong>, depending on the model. Known for its durability and simplicity, the O-235 powers aircraft like the Cessna 152, Piper Tomahawk, and various homebuilt designs. Whether you need a drop-in replacement for a trainer or an economical option for a new project, we’ve got the engine—and the support—you need.</p>
<p><strong>Available Options:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li><strong>Factory New</strong> – Zero-time engine built with all new Lycoming parts and full 24-month factory warranty</li>
<li><strong>Factory Rebuilt</strong> – Zero-time engine rebuilt on a new or serviceable Lycoming case and crankshaft, with same specs and warranty as new</li>
<li><strong>Lycoming Overhauled</strong> – Overhauled to service limits by Lycoming with a 12-month warranty</li>
</ul>
<p>Every engine sold by Air Power includes:</p>
<ul>
<li>Genuine Lycoming build and certification</li>
<li>Expert model matching and application guidance</li>
<li>Optional STC kits, accessories, and core return support</li>
<li>Crate-to-hangar delivery options</li>
</ul>
<p>As Lycoming’s top distributor globally, Air Power delivers more than just engines—we deliver trusted guidance, streamlined logistics, and direct access to the most comprehensive Lycoming inventory anywhere in the world.</p>
<p>Need install accessories? Explore <a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/plane-power-alternators">Plane Power Alternators</a> and <a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/barry-mounts-application-guide">Barry Engine Mounts</a> to complete your package.</p>
<p><img style="max-width: 200px; margin-top: 20px;" src="https://www.lycoming.com/sites/default/files/styles/media_crop/public/2022-05/Lycoming-logo-whitebg.png" alt="Lycoming Engines Logo" /></p>
</div>
<div class="container p-0">
<div class="ob-block ob-block-01">
<div class="row">
<div class="col-12">
<div class="page-title">
<h2><a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/lycoming-engines">Lycoming's Largest Engine Distributor Since 2011</a></h2>
</div>
<p>If you need a Lycoming engine, look to Air Power Inc. Since 1929, Lycoming aircraft engines have been an incredible addition to general aviation – carrying more than 700 FAA Certificated commercial aircraft engine configurations for both rotary-wing and fixed-wing applications. From its headquarters in Williamsport, Pennsylvania, Lycoming has built a name through its product quality, integrity, focus and dedication to customers. Air Power Inc. is proud to be the largest distributor of Lycoming aircraft engines globally, helping general aviation pilots keep their Lycoming-powered aircraft in the sky for over ten years. <a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/stockengines">We carry a diverse range of Lycoming aircraft engines for sale in our inventory</a>, including factory-new, overhauled and <a class="ap-blue-3-text" href="/stockengines">ready-to-ship engines </a>at the best prices in the industry.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="container p-0">
<div class="ob-block ob-block-01">
<div class="row">
<div class="col-12">
<div class="page-title">
<h2>Air Power, Inc. Is Your Trusted Supplier of Lycoming Engines &amp; Aircraft Engine Parts</h2>
</div>
<p>When your piston-powered aircraft is grounded, turn to Air Power Inc. We have a selection of Lycoming aircraft engines for sale at unbeatable prices. We're proud to work closely with the people at Lycoming and bring all the benefits that come with it to you. When you need to replace your Lycoming engine, cut your risk by sticking with factory OEM Lycoming aircraft engines direct from their production facility in Williamsport, Pennsylvania.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- wanted H3 but no bullet points, replaced with H2 -->
<div class="container p-0">
<div class="ob-block ob-block-01">
<div class="row">
<div class="col-12">
<div class="page-title">
<h3><a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/lycoming">We Stock Thousands of Lycoming Engine Parts In Our Inventory</a></h3>
</div>
<p>Air Power Inc. isn't just the largest distributor of Lycoming aircraft engines. We also carry an extensive selection of genuine <a class="ap-blue-3-text" href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/lycoming">Lycoming aircraft engine parts</a> for your maintenance and repair needs. From rollers and brackets to bearings and o-rings, Air Power gives you access to factory-engineered Lycoming engine replacement parts when and where you need them.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="container p-0">
<div class="ob-block ob-block-03">
<div class="row">
<div class="col-12">
<h3><a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/lycoming-engines">Our Lycoming Aircraft Engines Inventory Includes 7 Different Series Builds</a></h3>
<p>Here at Air Power Inc., we're confident we have the Lycoming aircraft engines you need to power your specific model of general aviation aircraft. After all, there's a reason we're the largest distributor in the world. Our complete line of Lycoming aircraft engines includes four-, six- and eight-cylinder piston engines boasting up to 400 horsepower. Our inventory includes:</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/235-series"><strong>235 Series</strong></a>: Produce up to 125 hp at 2,800 RPM</li>
<li><a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/320-series"><strong>320 Series</strong></a>: Produce 150 or 160 hp at 2,700 RPM</li>
<li><a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/360-series"><strong>360 Series</strong></a>: Produce 145 to 210 hp</li>
<li><a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/390-series"><strong>390 Series</strong></a>: Produce 210 hp at 2,700 RPM</li>
<li><a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/540-series"><strong>540 Series</strong></a>: Produce 235 to 360 hp at up to 2,700 RPM</li>
<li><a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/580-series"><strong>580 Series</strong></a>: Produce 315 hp at 2,700 RPM</li>
<li><a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/3720-series"><strong>720 Series</strong></a>: Produce up to 400 hp at 2,650 RPM</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="container p-0">
<div class="ob-block ob-block-04">
<div class="row">
<div class="col-12">
<div class="page-title">
<h2>Frequently Asked Questions About the Lycoming Aircraft Engines for Sale at Air Power Inc.</h2>
</div>
<p>When it comes to finding the perfect Lycoming engine for your aircraft, we know that even the smallest details matter. We pride ourselves on having complete transparency in our company and everything that goes into the process of purchasing your products. Here are some of the most commonly asked questions we get about Lycoming aircraft engines.</p>
<br />
<h3>How Are Your Lycoming Engines Priced?</h3>
<p>Air Power, Inc. is a leading low-cost OEM parts supplier across a variety of quality brands, including Lycoming aircraft engines. <em><strong>In the rare event you find a better price for an in-stock Lycoming engine from another authorized distributor, we will do everything in our power to beat that price</strong></em>. Just contact us with the details, and we'll work out the rest! Shipping terms may be factored into our price match consideration.</p>
<br />
<h3><a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/return-policy">What Are Your Return Policies Concerning Lycoming Aircraft Engines?</a></h3>
<p>As an authorized distributor for Lycoming Engines, we must mirror Lycoming's core return policy. Deviations from this policy must be approved in advance and must be made in writing. Core return dates include:</p>
<ul>
<li>Customers Within the United States (Domestic): 90 days after factory invoice</li>
<li>Customer Outside the United States (International): 120 days after factory invoice</li>
</ul>
<p>Please review our full <a class="ap-blue-3-text" href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/core-return-policy">core return policy</a> for more information regarding Lycoming aircraft engines.</p>
<br />
<h3>How Can I Pay for My Lycoming Engine?</h3>
<p>Lycoming engine purchases may only be paid for via wire transfer or business check drawn from a United States-based bank. <a href="https://www.airpowerinc.com/financing">Air Power, Inc. also offers engine financing, click here for details!</a></p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="container p-0">
<div class="ob-block ob-block-06">
<div class="row">
<div class="col-12">
<h2>Find Lycoming Aircraft Engines for Sale at Air Power Inc. Today</h2>
<p><strong>Air Power Inc. is dedicated to serving every customer to the best of our abilities, no matter what you need.</strong> Along with our service and extensive knowledge regarding all things Lycoming, our personal touch is what sets us apart from other distributors and dealers. If you have any questions or need assistance when purchasing your Lycoming aircraft engines, feel free to contact us at any time. Our expert specialists are always ready to help. Choose Air Power Inc. today.</p>
<br /><a class="ap-button mx-auto" href="/contactus ">Contact Us Today</a></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="container p-0">
<div class="ob-block ob-block-07">
<div class="row">
<div class="col-lg-4">
<div style="background: #2c2c2c; box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgb(0 0 0 / 6%); overflow: hidden;"><a href="https://airpowerinc.com/why-should-you-order-aircraft-parts-engines-sooner-than-later"><img style="margin-bottom: 1em;" src="https://airpowerinc.com/images/thumbs/0011694_Cessna%20Preparing%20For%20Takeoff_400.jpeg" alt="" /></a> <span class="day">29</span> <span class="monthAndYear">OCT 2021</span></div>
<div style="background: white; box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgb(0 0 0 / 6%); min-height: 150px;">
<h2>Why Should You Order Aircraft Parts &amp; Engines Sooner Than Later?</h2>
</div>
</div>
<div class="col-lg-4">
<div style="background: #2c2c2c; box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgb(0 0 0 / 6%); overflow: hidden;"><a href="https://airpowerinc.com/top-benefits-of-financing-an-airplane-engine-purchase"><img style="margin-bottom: 1em;" src="https://airpowerinc.com/images/thumbs/0013334_Benefits%20Of%20Airplane%20Engine%20Financing_400.jpeg" alt="" /></a> <span class="day">15</span> <span class="monthAndYear">DEC 2021</span></div>
<div style="background: white; box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgb(0 0 0 / 6%); min-height: 150px;">
<h2>Top Benefits of Financing an Airplane Engine Purchase</h2>
</div>
</div>
<div class="col-lg-4">
<div style="background: #2c2c2c; box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgb(0 0 0 / 6%); overflow: hidden;"><a href="https://airpowerinc.com/troubleshooting-ideas-aircraft-alternator-problems"><img style="margin-bottom: 1em;" src="https://airpowerinc.com/images/thumbs/0013507_aircraft-alternator-problems-min%20(1)_1000_400.png" alt="" /></a> <span class="day">30</span> <span class="monthAndYear">DEC 2021</span></div>
<div style="background: white; box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgb(0 0 0 / 6%); min-height: 150px;">
<h2>Troubleshooting Ideas for Aircraft Alternator Problems</h2>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
<div class="side-2">
<div class="blocks-wrapper">

<div class="footer-block newsetter">
<div class="title">
<strong>Newsletter</strong>
</div>
<div class="footer-collapse">
<p class="newsletter-subscribe-text">Subscribe and become part of the our community. Be the first to hear about our latest offers and discounts!</p>
<div class="newsletter">
<div class="title">
<strong>Newsletter</strong>
</div>
<div class="newsletter-subscribe" id="newsletter-subscribe-block">
<div class="newsletter-email">
<input title="Join Air Power Inc.'s Newsletter" id="newsletter-email" class="newsletter-subscribe-text" placeholder="Enter your email here..." aria-label="Sign up for our newsletter" type="email" name="NewsletterEmail" value="" />

<button type="button" id="newsletter-subscribe-button" class="button-1 newsletter-subscribe-button">Subscribe</button>

</div>
<div class="newsletter-validation">
<span id="subscribe-loading-progress" style="display: none;" class="please-wait">Wait...</span>
<span class="field-validation-valid" data-valmsg-for="NewsletterEmail" data-valmsg-replace="true"></span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="newsletter-result" id="newsletter-result-block"></div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="title">
<strong>Subscribe And Save</strong>
</div>

<div class="footer-collapse">
<p class="newsletter-subscribe-text">Stay up to date on all the latest deals from AirPower</p>


<div class="newsletter-subscribe">
<div class="newsletter-email phone-number-input-zone">
<input title="Join Air Power Inc.'s Subscribe And Save List"
id="subscribe-and-save-phone"
class="newsletter-subscribe-text"
placeholder="Enter your phone number..."
type="tel"
name="NewsletterPhone"
value=""
inputmode="numeric"
pattern="[0-9]{10,15}">
<button type="button" id="subscribe-and-save-submit-button" class="button-1 newsletter-subscribe-button">Subscribe</button>
</div>
<div class="newsletter-validation">
<span id="cognito-subscribe-loading-progress" style="display: none;" class="please-wait">Submitting...</span>
<span class="field-validation-valid" data-valmsg-for="NewsletterEmail" data-valmsg-replace="true"></span>
</div>
</div>

</div>



</div>

</div>

<script type="fe0d393487bfe3b91bf3eb66-text/javascript" src="/Plugins/NopStation.Plugin.Widgets.GoogleAnalytics/Content/js/nopstation.google.analytics.js?v=KI6OjbyJO5QQ5fWryxzZbZowWfQ"></script>

<script type="fe0d393487bfe3b91bf3eb66-text/javascript">
$(document).ready(function () {
$(CatalogProducts).on('before', function (e) {
var $viewModeEl = $('[data-viewmode].selected');
console.log($viewModeEl);
if ($viewModeEl)
{
e.payload.urlBuilder
.addParameter('viewmode', $viewModeEl.data('viewmode'));
}
});
});
</script>

<script type="fe0d393487bfe3b91bf3eb66-text/javascript">
$(document).ready(function () {
var $orderByEl = $('#products-orderby');
$orderByEl.on('change', function () {
CatalogProducts.getProducts();
});

$(CatalogProducts).on('before', function (e) {
e.payload.urlBuilder
.addParameter('orderby', $orderByEl.val());
});
});
</script>

<script type="fe0d393487bfe3b91bf3eb66-text/javascript">
$(document).ready(function () {
CatalogProducts.init({
ajax: true,
browserPath: '/235-series',
fetchUrl: '/category/products?categoryId=170'
});

addPagerHandlers();
$(CatalogProducts).on('loaded', function () {
addPagerHandlers();
});

// Extract 'pagenumber' from the URL query string
var urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
var pageNumber = urlParams.get('pagenumber') || 1; // Default to 1 if not found

// 5-POINT CUSTOMIZATION - Page 1 loads with no products, add in 3 placeholders while loading
$('.products-wrapper').html(`
<div class="product-grid">
<div class="item-grid">
<div class="item-box">
<div class="product-item">
<div class="picture">
<a href="#!" title=""></a>
</div>
<div class="details placeholder-glow">
<h3 class="product-title placeholder"><a href="#!">####### ####### ##### ####</a></h3>
<div class="sku placeholder">Part Number: #######</div>
<p class="stock-quantity placeholder" style="margin:5px 0 5px 0">### ## ##### - ###</p>
<div class="description placeholder"></div>
<div class="add-info">
<div class="prices">
<div class="box-prices-wrapper">
<span class="price actual-price placeholder">$##.##</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="item-box">
<div class="product-item">
<div class="picture">
<a href="#!" title=""></a>
</div>
<div class="details placeholder-glow">
<h3 class="product-title placeholder"><a href="#!">####### ####### ##### ####</a></h3>
<div class="sku placeholder">Part Number: #######</div>
<p class="stock-quantity placeholder" style="margin:5px 0 5px 0">### ## ##### - ###</p>
<div class="description placeholder"></div>
<div class="add-info">
<div class="prices">
<div class="box-prices-wrapper">
<span class="price actual-price placeholder">$##.##</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="item-box">
<div class="product-item">
<div class="picture">
<a href="#!" title=""></a>
</div>
<div class="details placeholder-glow">
<h3 class="product-title placeholder"><a href="#!">####### ####### ##### ####</a></h3>
<div class="sku placeholder">Part Number: #######</div>
<p class="stock-quantity placeholder" style="margin:5px 0 5px 0">### ## ##### - ###</p>
<div class="description placeholder"></div>
<div class="add-info">
<div class="prices">
<div class="box-prices-wrapper">
<span class="price actual-price placeholder">$##.##</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>`);

// Call getProducts with the extracted page number
CatalogProducts.getProducts(pageNumber);

// 5-POINT CUSTOMIZATION - End
});

function addPagerHandlers() {
$('[data-page]').on('click', function (e) {
e.preventDefault();
CatalogProducts.getProducts($(this).data('page'));
return false;
});
}
</script>

<script type="fe0d393487bfe3b91bf3eb66-text/javascript">
$("#small-search-box-form").on("submit", function (event) {
if ($("#small-searchterms").val() == "") {
alert('Please enter some search keyword');
$("#small-searchterms").focus();
event.preventDefault();
}
// 5-POINT CUSTOMIZATION - Adding ability to display RECENT SEARCHES - Per browser
// Save the search into localStorage on submit, clicking on a product in the list, should just navigate to that product without performing a search
else {
var numberOfLatestRecordsToKeep = 3;
var searchValue = $("#small-searchterms").val();

// Make sure localstorage value exists
if (localStorage.RecentSearchValues == undefined || localStorage.RecentSearchValues == "undefined") {
localStorage.RecentSearchValues = "";
}

// Init empty array, if localStorage has values, parse them into array
var currentRecentSearches = [];
if (localStorage.RecentSearchValues != "") {
currentRecentSearches = JSON.parse(localStorage.RecentSearchValues)
}

// Remove the current value from its current spot if it exists
var currentSearchValueIndex = currentRecentSearches.indexOf(searchValue);
if (currentSearchValueIndex != -1) {
currentRecentSearches.splice(currentSearchValueIndex, 1);
}
// Add value to array
currentRecentSearches.push(searchValue);

// Keep only the latest 3
var searchValueCount = currentRecentSearches.length;
if (searchValueCount > numberOfLatestRecordsToKeep) {
currentRecentSearches.splice(0, 1);
}

// Stringify & store in local storage
localStorage.RecentSearchValues = JSON.stringify(currentRecentSearches);
}
// 5-POINT CUSTOMIZATION END
});
</script>

<script type="fe0d393487bfe3b91bf3eb66-text/javascript">
UpdateSearchBar();

$(window).on("resize", function () {
UpdateSearchBar();
});

function UpdateSearchBar() {
if ($(window).width() > 1183) {
$("#small-search-box-form").addClass('open');
$("#small-searchterms").removeClass('search-box-text');
// Any other method of setting different styles on the screen was not working, but this did the trick. Just replace all inline styles
$("#small-searchterms").attr({ "style": "height: 40px !important;padding-left: 40px !important; padding-right: 135px !important;" });
}
else {
$("#small-searchterms").addClass('search-box-text');
// Any other method of setting different styles on the screen was not working, but this did the trick. Just replace all inline styles
$("#small-searchterms").attr({ "style": "height: 40px !important;padding-left: 40px !important; padding-right: 0px !important;" });
}
}
</script>

<script type="fe0d393487bfe3b91bf3eb66-text/javascript">
$(document).ready(function () {
var showLinkToResultSearch;
var searchText;
$('#small-searchterms').autocomplete({
delay: 500,
minLength: 3,
//source: '/catalog/searchtermautocomplete',
source: '/TopNavSearch',
appendTo: '.search-box',
select: function (event, ui) {
$("#small-searchterms").val(ui.item.label);
setLocation(ui.item.producturl);
return false;
},
//append link to the end of list
open: function (event, ui) {
//display link to search page
if (showLinkToResultSearch) {
searchText = document.getElementById("small-searchterms").value;
$(".ui-autocomplete").append("<li class=\"ui-menu-item\" role=\"presentation\"><a href=\"/SearchProducts?q=" + searchText + "\">View all results...</a></li>");
}
}
})
.data("ui-autocomplete")._renderItem = function (ul, item) {
var t = item.label;
showLinkToResultSearch = item.showlinktoresultsearch;
//html encode
t = htmlEncode(t);
return $("<li></li>")
.data("item.autocomplete", item)
.append("<a><img src='" + item.productpictureurl + "'><span>" + t + "</span></a>")
.appendTo(ul);
};


// 5-POINT CUSTOMIZATION - Adding ability to display RECENT SEARCHES - Per browser
function ShowRecentSearches() {
var searchValue = $('#small-searchterms').val();

// Make sure localstorage value exists
if (localStorage.RecentSearchValues == undefined || localStorage.RecentSearchValues == "undefined") {
localStorage.RecentSearchValues = "";
}

// Init empty array, if localStorage has values, parse them into array
var currentRecentSearches = [];
if (localStorage.RecentSearchValues != "") {
currentRecentSearches = JSON.parse(localStorage.RecentSearchValues)
}

// If search is empty, show recent searches
if (searchValue == null || searchValue == "") {
$(".ui-autocomplete").css('top', '-15px').css('position', 'relative').show();
$(".ui-autocomplete").empty();
if (currentRecentSearches != []) {
// Take array & reverse for most recent searches descending
$.each(currentRecentSearches.reverse(), function (i, v) {
if (v != "" && v != null) {
$(".ui-autocomplete").append("<li class=\"ui-menu-item\" role=\"presentation\"><a href=\"#!\" class='recentSearchRecord' data-val='" + v + "'><i class='fas fa-history mr-3'></i>" + v + " </a></li>");
//$(".ui-autocomplete").append("<li class=\"ui-menu-item\" role=\"presentation\"><a href=\"/SearchProducts?q=" + v + "\"><i class='fas fa-history mr-3'></i>" + v + " </a></li>");
}
});
}
else {
$(".ui-autocomplete").append("<li class=\"ui-menu-item\" role=\"presentation\"><a href=\"#!\">No Recent Searches</a></li>");
}
}
}


$('#small-searchterms').focus(function () {
ShowRecentSearches();
});

$('#small-searchterms').keyup(function () {
setTimeout(function () {
ShowRecentSearches();
}, 500);
});

$('#small-searchterms').change(function () {
ShowRecentSearches();
});

// This will fire on search submit or the input clear 'x' click
$('#small-searchterms').on("search", function () {
ShowRecentSearches();
});

$(".ui-autocomplete").on('click', ".recentSearchRecord", function () {
$('#small-searchterms').val($(this).attr('data-val'));
$("#small-search-box-form").submit();
})
// 5-POINT CUSTOMIZATION END
});
</script>

<script type="fe0d393487bfe3b91bf3eb66-text/javascript">
$(document).ready(function () {
$('.header').on('mouseenter', '#flyout-cart', function () {
$(this).addClass('active');
}).on('mouseleave', '#flyout-cart', function () {
$(this).removeClass('active');
});
});
</script>

<script type="fe0d393487bfe3b91bf3eb66-text/javascript">
var localized_data = {
AjaxCartFailure: "Failed to add the product. Please refresh the page and try one more time."
};
AjaxCart.init(false, '.cart-qty', '.wishlist-qty', '#flyout-cart', localized_data);
</script>

<script type="fe0d393487bfe3b91bf3eb66-text/javascript">
function newsletter_subscribe(subscribe) {
var subscribeProgress = $("#subscribe-loading-progress");
subscribeProgress.show();
var postData = {
subscribe: subscribe,
email: $("#newsletter-email").val()
};
addAntiForgeryToken(postData);
$.ajax({
cache: false,
type: "POST",
url: "/subscribenewsletter",
data: postData,
success: function (data, textStatus, jqXHR) {
$("#newsletter-result-block").html(data.Result);
if (data.Success) {
$('#newsletter-subscribe-block').hide();
$('#newsletter-result-block').show();
} else {
$('#newsletter-result-block').fadeIn("slow").delay(2000).fadeOut("slow");
}
},
error: function (jqXHR, textStatus, errorThrown) {
alert('Failed to subscribe.');
},
complete: function (jqXHR, textStatus) {
subscribeProgress.hide();
}
});
}

$(document).ready(function () {
$('#newsletter-subscribe-button').on('click', function () {
newsletter_subscribe('true'); });
$("#newsletter-email").on("keydown", function (event) {
if (event.keyCode == 13) {
$("#newsletter-subscribe-button").trigger("click");
return false;
}
});


$("#subscribe-and-save-phone").on("input", function () {
this.value = this.value.replace(/\D/g, ""); // Remove non-numeric characters
});

$("#subscribe-and-save-submit-button").click(function () {
var phoneNumber = $("#subscribe-and-save-phone").val().trim();

if (!phoneNumber) {
alert("Please enter your phone number.");
return;
}

$("#subscribe-loading-progress").show(); // Show loading indicator

$.ajax({
url: "/Customer/Subscribe",
type: "POST",
contentType: "application/json",
data: JSON.stringify({ phone: phoneNumber }),
success: function (response) {
// Fade out input and button, then replace with thank-you message
$(".phone-number-input-zone").fadeOut(300, function () {
$(this).html("<p class='thank-you-message'>Thank you for signing up! We appreciate your interest.</p>").fadeIn(300);
});
},
error: function (xhr) {
alert("Subscription failed: " + xhr.responseText);
},
complete: function () {
$("#subscribe-loading-progress").hide(); // Hide loading indicator
}
});
});

});
</script>

<script type="fe0d393487bfe3b91bf3eb66-text/javascript">
$(document).ready(function () {
$('#eu-cookie-bar-notification').show();

$('#eu-cookie-ok').on('click', function () {
var postData = {};
addAntiForgeryToken(postData);

$.ajax({
cache: false,
type: "POST",
data: postData,
url: "/eucookielawaccept",
dataType: "json",
success: function (data, textStatus, jqXHR) {
$('#eu-cookie-bar-notification').hide();
},
error: function (jqXHR, textStatus, errorThrown) {
alert('Cannot store value');
}
});
});
});
</script>


<script src="/cdn-cgi/scripts/7d0fa10a/cloudflare-static/rocket-loader.min.js" data-cf-settings="fe0d393487bfe3b91bf3eb66-|49" defer></script><script defer src="https://static.cloudflareinsights.com/beacon.min.js/v8c78df7c7c0f484497ecbca7046644da1771523124516" integrity="sha512-8DS7rgIrAmghBFwoOTujcf6D9rXvH8xm8JQ1Ja01h9QX8EzXldiszufYa4IFfKdLUKTTrnSFXLDkUEOTrZQ8Qg==" data-cf-beacon='{"version":"2024.11.0","token":"5754ab1b819d4454afaeabf815e59473","server_timing":{"name":{"cfCacheStatus":true,"cfEdge":true,"cfExtPri":true,"cfL4":true,"cfOrigin":true,"cfSpeedBrain":true},"location_startswith":null}}' crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
</body>
</html>
